sentences.text: Refine page by page, and point with @
After the big build you have the skeleton: every page in place and linked, with placeholder copy.
Now you go back to small, targeted changes — one page at a time.
For the About page, your real story sits in a notes file in your project folder.
Instead of copy-pasting, type "@" followed by the file's name to pull it into the chat, then ask Claude to use it.
That's a mention — a quick way to point Claude at one specific file.
